name: Scandinavian Salmon Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Can salmon, drained, skin removed, and flaked
12 oz Macaroni shells, medium-sized, cooked al-dente in water to which 1 tbsp Oil has been added
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the dressing ingredients in a small bowl.
2. In a large bowl, combine the salmon, scallions, and cooked shells.
3. Add the dressing to the bowl with the seafood mixture.
4. Gently toss everything together.
5. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. Garnish with sliced or quartered eggs just before serving.
